input.query: On starting a new session, the agent should load context and start a session

commands: rememora context --auto --project acme-api 2>&1 || echo "rememora not available or no prior context"
rememora session start --agent claude-code --project acme-api --intent "New coding session on acme-api Express REST API" 2>&1

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: rememora context --auto --project acme-api 2>&1 || echo "rememora not available or no prior context"

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: rememora session start --agent claude-code --project acme-api --intent "New coding session on acme-api Express REST API" 2>&1

descriptions: Should call rememora context to load prior context
Should start a new rememora session

input.query: When a design decision is made, the agent should save it as a decision memory

commands: rememora save "acme-api: Chose PostgreSQL over MongoDB. Payment system requires strong ACID transactions. MongoDB multi-doc transactions too weak/complex for payment workflows. Use PG tooling (Knex/Prisma/Drizzle), relational schemas, and lean on transactions for payment ops." --category decision --project acme-api --importance 0.9 2>&1 || echo "rememora not available"

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: rememora save "acme-api: Chose PostgreSQL over MongoDB. Payment system requires strong ACID transactions. MongoDB multi-doc transactions too weak/complex for payment workflows. Use PG tooling (Knex/Prisma/Drizzle), relational schemas, and lean on transactions for payment ops." --category decision --project acme-api --importance 0.9 2>&1 || echo "rememora not available"

descriptions: Should save with category=decision via rememora save --category decision

input.query: When a problem is solved, the agent should save it as a case memory

commands: rememora save "JWT_SECRET trailing newline bug: Auth middleware in acme-api failed silently because the JWT_SECRET env var had a trailing newline from the .env file. The newline caused jwt.verify() to always fail signature validation, but the error was swallowed by the catch block. Fix: trim the secret on load (process.env.JWT_SECRET.trim()) or ensure .env files have no trailing whitespace. Detection tip: if auth works with hardcoded secrets but not env vars, check for invisible whitespace characters." --category case --project acme-api --importance 0.9

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: rememora save "JWT_SECRET trailing newline bug: Auth middleware in acme-api failed silently because the JWT_SECRET env var had a trailing newline from the .env file. The newline caused jwt.verify() to always fail signature validation, but the error was swallowed by the catch block. Fix: trim the secret on load (process.env.JWT_SECRET.trim()) or ensure .env files have no trailing whitespace. Detection tip: if auth works with hardcoded secrets but not env vars, check for invisible whitespace characters." --category case --project acme-api --importance 0.9

descriptions: Should save with category=case via rememora save --category case

input.query: When asked to recall information, the agent should search rememora

commands: rememora search "database decision acme-api" --project acme-api 2>&1 || echo "rememora not available or no results"

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: rememora search "database decision acme-api" --project acme-api 2>&1 || echo "rememora not available or no results"

descriptions: Should search rememora for the database decision

input.query: When handing off to another agent, the session should end with status=transferred

commands: rememora session end 01JTEST123 --status transferred --summary "Session handoff requested by user. No active work was performed in this session — user initiated transfer immediately." --working-state "No in-progress tasks. Next agent should run 'rememora context --project acme-api' to load full project context including: Express REST API, PostgreSQL DB (chosen for ACID/payments), JWT auth (watch for trailing newline in JWT_SECRET .env gotcha)."

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: rememora session end 01JTEST123 --status transferred --summary "Session handoff requested by user. No active work was performed in this session — user initiated transfer immediately." --working-state "No in-progress tasks. Next agent should run 'rememora context --project acme-api' to load full project context including: Express REST API, PostgreSQL DB (chosen for ACID/payments), JWT auth (watch for trailing newline in JWT_SECRET .env gotcha)."

descriptions: Should end session with --status transferred for proper handoff

input.query: When ending a session normally, the agent should end with a summary

commands: rememora session end 01JTEST456 --summary "Added /users endpoint and fixed auth middleware bug (trailing newline in JWT_SECRET causing silent auth failure)" --working-state "Users endpoint complete, auth middleware fix deployed. No blockers."

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: rememora session end 01JTEST456 --summary "Added /users endpoint and fixed auth middleware bug (trailing newline in JWT_SECRET causing silent auth failure)" --working-state "Users endpoint complete, auth middleware fix deployed. No blockers."
